title: ItemEdit
description: Fast edit, customize and manage items
body:
🔧 ItemEdit – The Ultimate Item Customization Plugin

Take full control over item customization with ItemEdit – a powerful, user-friendly tool for editing and managing Minecraft items.

✨ Main Commands

  • /itemedit (/ie) – Instantly customize items with an intuitive command:
    • Rename items, change lore (with copy-paste support)
    • Set custom potion colors
    • Make items unbreakable or glow secretly by hiding enchantments
    • Hide potion effects for "mystery" potions
    • And much more!
  • /serveritem (/si) – Server-side item control:
    • Give, sell, and buy items from the console
    • Perfect for crates, kits, and server-managed custom items
  • /itemstorage (/is) – Store and retrieve your favorite item builds:
    • Great for creative mode and advanced builders

🛠️ Features

  • 🖊️ Change item name and lore (supports copy & paste)
  • 🙈 Hide unwanted text and tags from item lore
  • 💬 Edit item tooltip style for better presentation
  • 🧪 Customize potion effects
  • 🎨 Set custom colors for potions, leather armor, and tipped arrows
  • 🎆 Create and edit fireworks using a simple GUI
  • 🚩 Design and edit banners with a GUI
  • ✨ Enchant items manually
  • 🛡️ Make items unbreakable
  • 🌟 Make items glow (with hidden enchantments)
  • ⚙️ Edit item attributes (armor, damage, health, etc.)
  • 🔧 Change item max durability
  • 🧬 Modify custom model data and item model (for resource packs)
  • 🏷️ Change item rarity color
  • 🍔 Turn items into eatable food or drink with custom food properties
  • 🛡️ Turn any item into wearable equipment or armor
  • 🧭 Set a compass target location
  • 🐟 Customize axolotl and tropical fish bucket styles
  • 💠 Apply armor trim styles and colors
  • 📖 Change book type (original, copy, tattered, etc.)
  • 🧰 Repair items instantly
  • 🧵 Over 20 subcommands for deep item customization
  • 💾 Save and load custom items
  • 🏪 Create server shops and reward systems with saved items

🚀 Integrations with:

  • ✅ Vault
  • ✅ ShopGUI+
  • ✅ PlaceholderAPI
  • ✅ MythicMobs
  • 🧑‍💻 Developer API
  • 📦 Open Source & Free

🧙 Looking for Advanced Features?

Check out ItemTag – extend functionality with:

  • Executable commands on item use
  • Potion effects on armor
  • And more!

💡 User-Friendly Experience

  • Tab-completion for faster typing
  • Clickable help messages with hover descriptions
  • Client language based messages, over 10 languages already included
  • Designed with simplicity in mind

📚 Learn More

  • 🎥 Tutorial Video: Watch on YouTube
  • 💻 Source Code: View on GitHub
  • 🤝 Join the Community: Discord Support
  • ❤️ Donate: PayPal
